**Term**: <!-- The project-specific term being defined -->

**Definition**: <!-- A concise, plain-language definition (1–3 sentences). Avoid jargon; write for a reader who has not encountered this term before. -->

**Source**: <!-- Where the term originates or was first encountered. Use a file path, conversation reference, or external URL. Example: `.github/agents/quiz.agent.md`, "SAGE session 2026-05-20", or "https://example.com/spec" -->

**Date**: YYYY-MM-DD <!-- ISO date when this entry was added -->

**Notes** _(optional)_: <!-- Additional context, related terms, or disambiguation. Example: "Not to be confused with [related term]." Leave blank or remove this field if unused. -->
